embeds.title: Ramona / Gramona FAQ
embeds.description: Ramona / Gramona F.A.Q.       How do they work?-Both share Enlightens, Character, Talent and Skill Levels.-TLDR, any investment counts for both.How do I get the Enlightens?-They come with Keeper levels, in Growth Record, inside the Manual, it looks like this:(Enlighten is the purple thing...
